task_description: Extract structured data from a corporate annual report PDF, including financial tables, executive summary sections, and document metadata.

input_data.context: The PDF is a 2024 annual report for a mid-size technology company. It contains an executive letter, business overview, financial highlights table, revenue breakdown by segment table, balance sheet summary, and forward-looking statements. The document has mixed formatting including two-column layouts, embedded charts (ignore charts, extract only text and tables), and footnotes.
